title: Frontend Get Page Success Response
description: Schema for the successful response of getting a single page for frontend users with detailed section hierarchy.

parent_page_id.description: ID of parent page if this is a child page

is_headless.description: Whether this page is headless (no navigation)

open_in_modal.description: When true, the web frontend renders this page's content inside a modal overlay (page title as header + close button) instead of a full page. Web-only behaviour; mobile renders the page as a normal screen. Mirrors the open_in_modal page property field.

modal_width.description: Optional modal width applied when open_in_modal is true (web only). A CSS length (e.g. "80%", "640px") or "auto" (fit content, capped at 90% of the viewport). Null means the frontend default (80%). Mirrors the modal_width page property field.

modal_height.description: Optional modal height applied when open_in_modal is true (web only). A CSS length (e.g. "80%", "600px") or "auto" (fit content, capped at 90% of the viewport). Null means the frontend default (80%). Mirrors the modal_height page property field.

title.description: Translated page title for the requested language (used for <title> / OpenGraph)

description.description: Translated page description for the requested language (used for <meta name="description"> / OpenGraph)

should_fallback.description: True when the page has no section whose style name matches the page keyword (e.g. login page with no login-style section). Frontend should fall back to its hardcoded route.

route_params.description: Snake_case route parameters extracted from the matched public URL pattern (e.g. {"user_id":"42","token":"abc"} or {"record_id":"7"}). Present only when the page was resolved via GET /pages/resolve. Also available to interpolation as {{route.<name>}}.

matched_url_pattern.description: The page_routes path_pattern that matched the resolved path (e.g. "/reset/{user_id}/{token}"). Present only for GET /pages/resolve.

canonical_url.description: The canonical active route pattern for the resolved page, for canonical-link generation. Present only for GET /pages/resolve.

sections.description: Array of sections that make up the page content
